mentions.text:
While people are scared, bought $100k $SG on the drop to $8.22. 

No news, down 8.2%+. Meanwhile markets and high beta stocks like $HOOD, $RKLB, $ALAB, $CREDO, $HIMS, $APP are rising.

Best time to buy is on the extreme fear when retail are selling the shares they bought at $40 https://t.co/vBZhOJF1y0

reasons: cited as example of major doom drop where short term options recovery play makes sense
mentions.text:
@lr_1994 I mean $NBIS, $RDDT on the dip were my two choices.

 But if you're buying short term options don't recommend it usually unless there's a major doom drop like $APP and you're expecting a recovery.

There are two companies that don’t care about market crashes. 

$APP down 19.7%
$DNKG down 19.4%
$PINS down to 19.1%
$ASTS down 15.21%
$RDW down to 13.1% 
$USAR down 12.4%
Silver down 11.6%
$OSS down 9.58%
$RGTI down 8.85%
$RDDT down 6.8%
$RKLB down 5.4%
$APPL down 5.09%
Gold down 3.4%
SPY Index down 1.54%

Sandisk up 7.21%. 

The other biggest gainer? Walmart, up 3.78% today.

You have a fwd 2027 p/e ~7 memory company growing net income at triple digits y/y.

And a bath towel reseller growing in line with inflation sitting at 46 p/e, outperforming the market.

Markets are starting to make less and less sense.
